groups.title: Group 0
groups.status: visual check: intact / no clear leakage or evaporation

groups.title: Group 1
groups.status: visual check: possible leakage or evaporation; classify separately

groups.title: Group 2
groups.status: visual check: possible leakage or evaporation; classify separately

interpretation: Group 0 is the cleanest sample category by visual inspection.
Groups 1 and 2 may include leakage or evaporation, so lower shape separation should be treated as a device-failure effect, not only a fingerprint-method failure.
Use intact samples for fingerprint claims; classify leaked/dried samples as a separate failed/uncertain category.

shapeHighlight.summary: A cell is distinguishable when the nearest other-cell distance is larger than the worst same-cell variation.
